ItacAcademyItem.Name: Allettati (Accademia degli)
ItacAcademyItem.AlternativeName: Accademia degli Approvati|Accademia dei Disgiunti|Accademia degli Svegliati|Accademia dei Disingannati
ItacAcademyItem.EmblemDescription: Amber and straw / Eagle exposing its eaglets to the sun / Diamond / Lion roaring at dead cubs who revive / Partridge covering the eggs of hen, the chick when hatched run to their real father
ItacAcademyItem.Motto: Non vi sed virtute / Non aliunde / Sua / Non alla voce / Hanc post aliam alteram
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Mottoes and emblems correspond to the various names. See Maylender for the chronological order of these Academies.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
